LAW AND MOTION 301, NOTICE WAS NOT GIVEN TO THE OTHER PARTY AFTER THE TENTATIVE RULING CAME OUT. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANTS ADAM CHALL, DAVID BRIEFSTEIN, SUTANTO DARSONO AND YAN CHEN'S PETITION TO CONFIRM BINDING ARBITRATION AWARD IS GRANTED. THE ARBITRATION AWARD IS CONFIRMED IN THE AMOUNT REQUESTED BY PETITIONER $16,696.91. CALDERON'S ATTEMPT TO DISMISS IS INEFFECTIVE. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR # 8189 301/PJB

Notice And Motion On Petition To Confirm Binding Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Feb-05-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - NANCY CALDERON, PLAINTIFF APPEARING IN PRO PER;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - NOTICE WAS NOT GIVEN TO THE OTHER PARTY AFTER THE TENTATIVE RULING CAME OUT. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANTS ADAM CHALL, DAVID BRIEFSTEIN, SUTANTO DARSONO AND YAN CHEN'S Petition To Confirm Binding Arbitration Award IS GRANTED. THE ARBITRATION AWARD IS CONFIRMED IN THE AMOUNT REQUESTED BY PETITIONER $16,696.91. CALDERON'S ATTEMPT TO DISMISS IS INEFFECTIVE. Prevailing party is to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 =301/PJB

Notice Of Petition To Compel Mediation And Arbitration Or, In The Alt, Demurrer To Complaint; Request For Judicial Notic
Off Calendar Sep-08-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - NANCY CALDERON, PLAINTIFF APPEARING IN PRO PER;
ATTY. JODI CHALL, OF THE LAW OFFFICE OF TERRI MANDEL, P.C., TEL. NO. (650) 357-0354 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANTS AND MOVING PARTIES.

RULING - MS. CALDERON WAS REQUESTING THE COURT FOR A CONTINUATION OF THE HEARING IN ORDER TO HIRE COUNSEL. THE COURT DENIED THE REQUEST. DEFENDANTS ADAM CHALL, DAVID BRIEFSTEIN, SUTANTO DARSONO AND YAN CHEN'S Petition To Compel Mediation And Arbitration Or, In The Altrnative, Demurrer To Complaint- THE COURT GRANTED THE PETITION TO ARBITRATE. NO OPPOSITION FILED. Moving party is to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR # 7077 = (301/HEK)
